decision.summary: No new action: the daily board has not rolled cleanly to the new session yet, and the weekly 72k dip remains the only live thesis-aligned position.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean and only the weekly `will-bitcoin-dip-to-72k-april-20-26` Yes position remains open. Binance spot is 75735.28, still below the 76k resistance area from the latest Beecthor thesis, so the broader directional read remains bearish/corrective rather than a fresh confirmed upside breakout. However, this 04:00 UTC snapshot still shows the expiring April 20 daily markets with probabilities effectively near zero or already fully priced, which means the new daily slate is not yet available in a usable way. Opening from this stale board would be forcing execution on markets that are already resolved or rolling off. The correct action is to hold the weekly bearish position and wait for the new daily session to appear cleanly before considering any daily thesis or momentum trade.
